task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Multi-Tenant Workspaces** (Level 8)

Users belong to workspaces. POST /api/workspaces creates a workspace. POST /api/workspaces/:id/members adds a user to a workspace. GET /api/workspaces/:id/items returns only items that belong to that workspace. Items are scoped to workspace — you can't see items from other workspaces.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Workspaces table:
  name, required

create a Members table:
  workspace_id, requi
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Workspaces table:
  name, required

create a Members table:
  workspace_id, required
  user_id, required

create a Items table:
  title, required
  workspace_id, required

when user calls POST /api/workspaces sending data:
  validate data:
    name must not be empty
  workspace = save data to Workspaces
  send back workspace with status 201

when user calls GET /api/workspaces:
  workspaces = get all Workspaces
  send back workspaces

when user calls POST /api/workspaces/:id/members sending member_data:
  validate member_data:
    user_id must not be empty
  member_data's workspace_id is this id
  member = save member_data to Members
  send back member with status 201

when user calls GET /api/workspaces/:id/items:
  items = get all Items where workspace_id is this id
  send back items
